content:
After a much awaited lollipop antenna upgrade. I didn’t do a range test - it was getting dark enough already 🤷‍♂️. Besides, it was much more fun to chase those geese a full circle around that water tower. I could have gotten a brighter shot if I removed the ND filter. But it protects the Moonlight camera lens as you can see below 😅.

title: Chasing the geease at dusk
